case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. D-11 of 2022

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. D-11 of 2022 (Ameer Wali Khan Vs. The State) 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 14-02-2023. Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, advocate for applicant. Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF. >>>>>...<<<<< The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application under section 561-A Cr.P.C has sought for custody of the Bus subject matter of the present case on superdari for the reason that he is its bonafide purchaser and there exist no reasonable ground to believe that it has been used in commission of alleged incident. Apparently on search from its secret cavities have been secured 32.400 Kilograms Opium by police party of ANF Sukkur; it is subject to confiscation in terms of section 32 of Control of Narcotic Substance, Act, 1997, as such its custody could not be restored to the applicant on superdari under the deception that he is its bonafide purchaser and there exist no reasonable ground to believe that it is used in commission of incident, consequently instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
